title: vaccinium myrtillus subsp. compactum
intro: Vaccinium myrtillus subsp. compactum, also known as the dwarf bilberry or compact bilberry, is a subspecies of the bilberry plant that is smaller in size and has a more compact growth habit compared to the typical bilberry. The medicinal properties of Vaccinium myrtillus subsp. compactum include its high antioxidant content and its ability to inhibit the growth of certain bacteria and fungi. The health benefits of consuming Vaccinium myrtillus subsp. compactum include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as its potential to help manage blood sugar levels and reduce the risk of certain cancers. Vaccinium myrtillus subsp. compactum can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
